name: Greek Cannellini Beans with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 medium yellow crookneck or zucchini squash, chopped
3 cups cooked and drained cannellini beans, or one 15-ounce can artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
1/4 cup Italian style stewed tomatoes, from a 14-ounce can
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large covered pot, bring water to a boil.
2. Add orzo to the boiling water and return it to a boil.
3. Simmer for about 10 minutes until al dente.
4. Drain the orzo and add 2 tablespoons olive oil. Stir well and set aside.
5. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Add garlic and onions, stirring occasionally, until fragrant and onions are translucent.
7. Add carrots and bell peppers to the skillet and stir well.
8. Add squash, beans, and vegetables to the skillet with the remaining ingredients.
9. Mix well and gently incorporate dill, marjoram, and mint.
10. Stir in cannellini beans, artichoke hearts, and stewed tomatoes.
11. Simmer for several minutes until heated through.
12. Combine the orzo with the hot beans and vegetables.
13. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
14. Serve hot with a splash of red wine vinegar.
